references.text: [EGRS75] Erd\H{o}s, P. and Graham, R. L. and Ruzsa, I. Z. and Straus, E. G., On the prime factors of $(\sp{2n}\sb{n})$. Math. Comp. (1975), 83-92.

remarks.text: A problem of Erd\H{o}s, Graham, Ruzsa, and Straus \cite{EGRS75}, who say it is 'not hard to show that', for almost all $n$, the minimal such $m$ satisfies\[m=\exp((\log n)^{1/2+o(1)}).\]

statement.text: Find some reasonable function $f(n)$ such that, for almost all integers $n$, the least integer $m$ such that $m\nmid \binom{2n}{n}$ satisfies\[m\sim f(n).\]
